G

Game - Class in com.examplez.demo.Model
Central model for the turn-based card game.
Game(int) - Constructor for class com.examplez.demo.Model.Game
Creates a game configured for the requested number of participants.
GameLauncher - Class in com.examplez.demo
 
GameLauncher() - Constructor for class com.examplez.demo.GameLauncher
 
getAceValueForMachine() - Method in class com.examplez.demo.Model.Game
Chooses the highest valid value for an ace played by a machine.
getCardValue() - Method in class com.examplez.demo.Model.Card
Returns the value used when evaluating a play.
getCurrentSumGame() - Method in class com.examplez.demo.Model.Game
Returns the score accumulated by all played cards.
getDesk() - Method in class com.examplez.demo.Model.Desk
Return the cards of the desk
getHandCard() - Method in class com.examplez.demo.Model.Player
Returns the player's current hand.
getHandHumanPlayer() - Method in class com.examplez.demo.Model.Game
Returns the cards held by the human player.
getHumanPlayer() - Method in class com.examplez.demo.Model.Game
Returns the human player assigned to turn zero.
getIdCard() - Method in class com.examplez.demo.Model.Card
Returns the identifier assigned to this card.
getLastCard() - Method in class com.examplez.demo.Model.Desk
Removes and returns the card stored at the end of the deck.
getLastCard() - Method in class com.examplez.demo.Model.DiscardPile
Returns the active card without removing it.
getLastCardPlayed() - Method in class com.examplez.demo.Model.Game
Returns the most recently played card.
getPossibleAceValues() - Method in class com.examplez.demo.Model.Game
Calculates the ace values that remain valid for the current score.
getTurn() - Method in class com.examplez.demo.Model.Player
Returns the player's turn identifier.
getTurnPlayers() - Method in class com.examplez.demo.Model.Game
Builds the current sequence of active turn identifiers.
getTurnState() - Method in class com.examplez.demo.Model.PlayerHuman
Returns the current human-turn state.
